title: EvaluateRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-evaluate. Authorization is carried in the `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header and is NEVER placed in the body.

action_type.description: Action class being authorized (e.g. 'payment.transfer'). Stable identifier.

actor_id.description: Identifier of the actor/agent making the request (e.g. 'user:42', 'agent:support-bot').

context.description: Arbitrary policy context. Values MUST be JSON-serializable. Defaults to {} when omitted.

request_id.description: Idempotency key. Retries with the same value replay the recorded decision.

shadow.description: If true, evaluate in shadow mode: no permit is issued, the request is not recorded as a live decision.

explain.description: If true, response includes a per-rule `trace` array.

traceparent.description: W3C traceparent for body-level trace propagation when the transport cannot forward HTTP headers.
